review_text:
We had a very disappointing experience at Beachside Holiday Caravan Park during what was meant to be a Mother’s Day family trip.

We had booked neighbouring sites so our family could spend the weekend together and made arrangements to finish work early specifically to comply with the park’s daylight check-in requirements. The intention was a relaxed, planned family stay.

On arrival, there was confusion regarding our booking type (2x caravan booked instead of 1x caravan & 1x camper trailer), which we acknowledged may have been due to limitations in the online booking system, as it was not very clear or user-friendly and does not allow multiple sites to be booked under one reservation. Although staff had previously contacted us to confirm details, the booking email confirmation itself contained very limited site-specific information.

We were then allocated a site with a concrete slab. Once we began setting up, it became clear the site was not reasonably suitable for safe setup due to uneven levels, multiple height changes, and drop-offs at the edges of the slab. This made it difficult to safely position and stabilise our setup, and we did our best to work within those limitations.

We spent approximately 1.5 hours attempting to set up in good faith. The only workable arrangement required angling the drawbar towards our parents neighbouring caravan rather than toward the roadway.

Importantly, we had stayed at this same park around 12 months earlier with the same setup and positioned it in a similar way without any issue or comment from management at the time. At no point during check-in on this visit were we advised of any strict orientation requirement or that our setup would be considered non-compliant.

After it became dark, staff approached us and advised that our setup was not acceptable due to a “safety issue” and that we would need to fully pack down and reposition. No practical assistance, alternative site, or workable solution was offered, despite the time of night and the complexity of resetting a soft-floor setup in the dark.

We raised concerns that this would create further safety risks given visibility and the time required to dismantle and reset, however we were left with no reasonable option but to leave the park entirely.

We then requested a refund given we were unable to reasonably complete our stay. Despite this, management refused any refund (including partial refund), stating the site was allocated based on booking details and referencing park rules regarding orientation.

We also found the communication throughout this process to be very poor. In person, staff were dismissive, very rude and unhelpful when the issue was raised, and this same tone continued in the written response to our refund request. There was no willingness to explore any practical resolution or acknowledge the circumstances we were placed in.

Overall, this was extremely disappointing given this was meant to be a special Mother’s Day family weekend. We were left feeling unsupported, out of pocket, and as though there was no flexibility or consideration for real-world setup issues once on site.
Nice park great views of the sea ,toilets are clean friendly staff nice green spots for the van. Just good alround

The online booking system was ridiculous, first page was 101 (sic) rules before we start, so many red flags re deposits and how to lose it. Then wouldn't accept my booking because I "broke the rules" and only accepts bookings via phone. Why have the online booking button if you can only book by phone?
The wording really isn't friendly at all.
I may have missed out on something great, but maybe not, I definitely didn't feel welcomed and have decided to go elsewhere.
EDIT* After reading the owners response, I decided to have another go, Website was friendlier and booking was straight forward and successful. Thank you, I will review again after my stay
Very good site. Extremely pleasant team and immaculate
All the staff were lovely except one….. wow what a control freak , a lecture about how to read a map and don’t get between her and her highlighter … your customer service skills are horrendous !!!!

This place is amazing. As a solo backpacker with a tent, this was easily one of the better places I stayed. There is a camp kitchen with a microwave and the facilities are always clean. The owner was so incredibly friendly, she made me feel at home and in a safe space. Thank you, I would definitely come back if I could.
Big plus; it is next to the beach!
Excellent location, direct beach access, friendly accommodating staff, clean and modern facilities 10/10
Een heerlijke plek direct aan het strand. We kwamen eigenlijk te laat aan maar er was iemand zo aardig om op ons te wachten. Verder is het er lekker schoon en vriendelijk

This is an amazing caravan park. Sites are very big & easy to reverse into. If you would like help, staff are happy to assist. Right on the beach. Staff are very welcoming and helpful.  The amenities are clean & tidy. The beach is very calm so anyone can swim in it. There is a flag area further into town.
Close to all shops, cinema, Yeppoon is just amazing.
The only negative thing was ‘I didn’t want to leave 😞’
We will be back 😊
David and Tracey Ayling

We recently spent four nights here and it was brilliant. The location, wow, right on the beach but also such easy access to shops & cafes.
Every staff we came into contact with was so pleasant, the grounds were so well kept and the bathrooms always immaculate. We will definitely be back! Thanks for a wonderful memorable stay.
Brought our camper van and got a beachfront pitch - beautiful views
Caravan park location is lovely - backs up to the beach.

Location is fantastic being right on the beach & only a 10 minute walk to the town centre. Also has good bike/walk paths along the beach front. Caravan site was generous & amenities were very clean & well maintained.

Beautiful Beachside Spot
As their name says, absolute beachside location with island views. Huge beach when tide is out wonderful for walking and biking. Also great for families with kids who want to get into some sandcastle action. Lots of powered beachfront sites, all level, they have some unpowered sites too and lots of trees if looking for some shade. My check-in was friendly and efficient and a staff member helped me onto my site. Amenities and laundry very clean, park has 4 dump points, 2 camp kitchens with BBQs and even pots with herbs. Perhaps a 10-15 minute walk into town CBD and just a tad longer to the fabulous Yeppoon lagoon. I’m sure I’ll be back.

Loved this stop, darkness clean and we woke up to a beach front view of the world .
Lovely peaceful area and a great find

Had the best time the staff were fabulous and very friendly ☺️ the facilities were so clean. We will definitely be back!
Thanks to you all!

Dieser Caravanpark ist wirklich toll! Die Mitarbeiter sind bemüht alle wünsche zu erfüllen, die Sanitäranlagen waren immer sauber und man merkt wie viel liebe darin steckt.
Ich habe mit meinem Partner einige Caravan Parks in Queensland besucht und war wirklich sehr zufrieden mit diesem!

Wunderschöner Campingplatz direkt am Strand!
Sehr sauber, ruhig und perfekt zum Entspannen. Besonders das freundliche Personal und die tolle Lage haben uns begeistert.
Wir haben uns sehr wohlgefühlt und kommen gerne wieder!
Campervan site right next to tge water and woke to a fantastic sunrise.

Just spent 3 days at this holiday caravan site..excellent position right on the beach front ,with a powered site .no issues at all ...and can highly recommend for cleanliness and great price. Will definitely be back when in this part of Queensland..

Location is top drawer with sites right on the shore front with a 10m walk onto the beach. Powered sites are generously sized and have everything you need. Toilet/showers were clean and worked great. 10min walk to Yeppoon town centre so easy access to great cafes and restaurants.

Beachside Holiday Caravan Park. From the moment we walked into reception we were made to feel very welcome. The information was thorough, the receptionist very knowledgable, and we were on our way to our site in no time. Great facilities, clean, well kept park that will not disapoint.
highly recommended.

No help was offered by staff and they didnt care for our experience one bit. management was not good at managing the park. Its not a place to take children or friends as its all rules and you can barely enjoy yourself. Terrible experience, -10/10 do not recommend

Booked a beachfront site 11 months in advance. On arrival we were told our van was “too big” and weren’t even allowed to try the site, despite us measuring and knowing it would fit. We were pushed onto a roadside site with no offer of a price refund or to move anyone who hadn’t arrived yet.

Reception (Kath) was rude, inflexible and unhelpful. Poor customer service here clearly seems to be a repeat pattern. We left for a much better park and are still waiting on a refund and response from management for not receiving what we paid for.

Extremely disappointing. Would not recommend.

Location is the only thing this park can offer besides a rude arrogant office manager. Rules, rules, rules. Check in time midday till 5pm is strictly adhered to. Arrive early, sit out front and wait, arrive late, you will need to sleep elsewhere as you missed the check in window. Vans are measured on arrival, so don’t expect to get the site you booked and paid for, you might not fit. They will happily take your money upfront, with no intention of returning it should you have unexpected delays. There a better parks with better customer service and facilities in the area.
Great spot to camp

Excellent location.
Staff offer help to park ya van if required.
15 minute walk into town.
And beautiful fish n chips over the road.

Unfortunately, a negative experience with Beachside Holiday Caravan Park. The process felt unfair and a little misleading. After payment is made, they send a link to the terms and conditions by email. What is was not made clear upfront on the phone is that there are absolutely no refunds under any circumstances if you are unable to attend within 14 days of the booking—even if the reservation itself was made less than 14 days in advance and even if the situation is beyond your control. I was initially given false hope by the first representative I spoke with, only to have that overturned by Kath whom I presume is the owner/manager. It is disappointing they prioritise money over genuine customer service and compassion.

We had friends come and visit and we booked them a powered site at at Beachside Holiday Park,  as they wanted to stay in their own caravan - it was so nice there I wanted to move in with them!
Beautiful beach walks every morning and close enough to walk into town.
It reminded me of the good old days!

We recently stayed at Beachside Holiday Caravan Park in Yeppoon with the family, and it was exactly the kind of easy, stress-free beach holiday we were hoping for. The park is right on the beachfront, so the kids could literally wake up, run outside, and start playing in the sand within minutes – which made mornings relaxed and magical. Our site had plenty of room to park the van and spread out, without feeling cramped or boxed in. The amenities were tidy, clean, and well-maintained throughout our stay, which made a big difference when travelling with children. One of the best parts was being able to walk into Yeppoon’s CBD. We parked the car and barely touched it again.
Absolutely beautiful spot beachside for the caravan. Fantastic care takers, very clean amenities.
Super emplacement au bord de la plage

Absolutely the best park in Yeppoon. Friendly staff in the office, and they even help to get into your campsite. (Safe the marriage)
Friendly staff that will stop and talk to you, don’t really find it in other parks.
Amenities are spotless and neat. Will definitely come back to this park.

We arrived today after a 6 hour drive and were  really disappointed by a staff memeber (Kath) who started screaming when we were parking the van. It was the first reverse to get into position and get our bearings. It seemed like Kath was on drugs and was abusing us on how to park our caravan yelling saying no it needs to be here. She basically pushed us out of the park with rage and attitude. She stormed over and said we’ll give you a refund. We’ve been travelling for over 12 months and have never experienced anything like this. super disappointed.

Very disappointing stay. The woman from management was extremely rude and unhelpful from start to finish. It honestly felt like her goal was to make our stay as unpleasant as possible. The whole atmosphere was affected, and we left with a really bad impression.
I absolutely do not recommend this campsite.

Beautiful and quiet park with relaxing views of the beach.
Well maintained grounds and amenities.
Thanks for an enjoyable stay!

If anything goes wrong like breaking down on the side of the road and you can’t make it there before check-in, you’ve lost your booking and need to be prepared to pretty much sleep on the side of the road.

The service was shockingly horrific and there was no empathy or leniency in any way to accomodate any issues that may occur to its customers.

I definitely would not recommend as my experience with other caravan parks are so much smoother, and really take care of its customers!!

Problems can occur any time and the fact that they refuse to provide me with a late check-in, they cancelled my booking just hours before arriving and are also refusing to refund me was appalling. I was travelling with children as well and had to book last minute accommodation that unfortunately cost a lot of money.

I write this review simply to save you the headache and hope for a better change

Gotta love Yeppoon.  This park is situated right on the beach (thus the name 😂😂).  Assistance is provided to get you onto difficult sites, the staff are friendly and efficient.  Ammenities are spotless and the park itself is in very good condition.  You can also book all your excursions from the office which offers discounts.  A beautiful walk from the park into Yeppoon centre.  Highly recommend this park.
Awesome location
Called to book a site the lady was so incredibly rude we cancelled before we even finished the booking and went elsewhere

Cosy place, right on the beach.
The site do needs some updating.
Nice clean camp and excellent location. Right on the beach and 10 minutes walk to town.
We got the caravan space no 80. It is the best spot in all our travels...thanks

Nice campsite right by the beach but staff are abrupt when you arrive with their list of everything you can’t do in the park, it’s a massive list of no’s. Wifi only works in one square meter area next to office.

We stayed in a campervan, and the beachside lots were awesome! You can look out your backwindow and watch the sunrise rising over the beach. (So nice to have beach access so close)
The caretakers were all very helpful and kind, and they know a lot about the area so be sure to ask them about all the best things to do while you are in Yepoon/Rockhampton.

Stayed here for 2 nights in early September. We stayed at the BC7 non-powered site, and there was a couple of curlews nesting an egg between the BC7 and BC8 sites. We were told that curlews usually use the same exact spot for nesting, and that there was another nest on the other of the campground, so if you ever stay please watch out for curlews nest on the ground. It is also illegal to move wildlife of course, the nest are super hard to see as the eggs are usually camouflaged.
Great holiday spot.  Easy access to the beach and a nice stroll down to the shops, cafes and restaurants.  Clean facilities and friendly staff

Unfortunately, we were not too impressed with this caravan park. It was very expensive - The location is great, amenities are clean, but what I really needed was Wi-Fi . The usual story when you go to the office “our Internet is not working Properly???. when you’re traveling on the road for months at a time, it’s important when you pull into a caravan park that offers Wi-Fi that it actually works! would not recommend this caravan park- staff were unhelpful.

We stayed here 14.7.25 - 19.7.25 .  A nice park very close to the beach . The sounds of the waves crashing  of a morning was 👌, the  shower / toilet facilities were very clean and well maintained .  Staff were very friendly and quick to lend a hand if needed.

Only thing I could pick on haha was there is only 1 space to check in and when busy clogs up the road.

4.5 stars out of 5 stars . I would recommend this park .
Love this park best in yeppoon by far

Not a bad van park. However , unless you are on the second or third site there is no wifi access. Also not happy with the late check in due to staff needing to “blow” off a van site. Can happily say there were still leaves and dirt on our van site so perhaps just a money making scheme there. All and all not bad

Great location and close to walk into town. Good amenities and nice big space for van. Not piled in on one another. Can be noisy on weekdays from 5am due to main road. Otherwise really happy and would stay again.
Absolutely excellent camp ground to stay. The staff were so helpful on booking and then on check in. Highly recommend their unpowered grass sites. There may not be many but they are big.

The caravan park is located in a lovely spot , unfortunately the staff are not what I expected for people who are in the hospitality business. While ringing up and booking my Van site - I was aware the staff member was new and learning- I made a comment that I understood everyone has to learn . However after 14 minutes on the phone and no support from her office manager- - I said to the young girl - I need to get this done as I was coming into traffic and my wife will give her the CC details - with still no help from her staff - her office manager came on and was very rude - it didn’t stop there- when I arrived- I was told it was unacceptable how I spoke - while never raising my voice or saying anything inappropriate- I told them my side - this made no difference. Then they came down the next day and measured my van - and rang me advise I told them the wrong size - that was a lie- I was told the measurement in feet - I said I told them in meters - they said we only deal in feet - - I think they need to remember they are in the service industry- or maybe they need to be trained on how to talk to customers.  My wife worked for Tourism Queensland for 20 years and we were horrified.

We were three families (all seniors) over Easter weekend - very nice camp but the front desk experience during check-in was awful - if we did not pay in advance we would have probably just left.  The lady was very hostile, did not smile or make eye contact once, but very eager to stipulate and highlight every rule of the camp as if we were a few naughty kids in the head master's office.  |Positives:  Very good location, well looked after and very clean.  Peaceful at night even if situated right next to the main street.  Easy access to the beach.|Negatives:  Not good for groups as you cannot really set up a nice camp to be together.  The amenity block with the showers don't have a socket point so you have to move everything to the next block (where there are no showers) to use your hair dryer, and the mirror in there is black - you can hardly see yourself in it.  Biggest disappointment of the weekend, we had a lot of valuable stuff stolen from our camp site on the Sunday night, literally two metres from where we were sleeping, and other campers had some stuff stolen as well, so unfortunately this is a camp where you cannot leave anything outside unattended, and you will have to pack up stuff continuously when you go somewhere or even before you go to sleep.

Rang to book an easily accessible site was told no problem, there was not a beach front site available but could offer one row back. (There are only two rows of the caravan park). On arrival we were guided to a staff must assist site. (Not easily accessible) we were instructed to park less than 1 metre to the next caravan and the off side of our van running parallel to the road. We were subjected to extreme road noise. The site was tight up against an access gate point again advised by management needed to be kept clear for the comfort of all park patrons. Our draw bar missed the entry to the gate by less than 250mm, although we clearly advised the length of our van at time of booking. Mia in reception was very clear about dont's for our stay and at the end of her don't list wished us a pleasant stay. Toilets were acceptable along with camp kitchen.  Great spot to walk on the beach or access township of Yeppoon, we won't return.
Great spot beachfront, lovely staff, wifi very poor and signal comes and goes even sitting under hotspot. Tide goes away out. Short easy walk to town.

Quaint older caravan park between beach and main road. Has all the usual facilities, but somewhat tired and dated, especially camp kitchens and toilets. Most  sites can accommodate larger vans and tow rigs, some have slabs or ground mats. Road noise can be annoying for sites backing onto the road as there is no effective screening.  Very easy access onto the public beach with great views towards Keppel Island.
Amazing service from phone booking to counter to parking van. First park I will give 100% service, well trained staff. Management are commeded 👏

Very clean amenities and well kept gardens. Would definitely come again. Highly recommended.
Beachfront sites.
Nice quiet park
Not the flashess caravan park and is expensive for what you get but on the beach and not too far of a walk along the beach into town

Just returned to Beachside Easter 25. Still brilliant, unmatched beachfront location. One of our favourite locations on the East Coast. Park operators are excellent. Will definately return in the future.

Great location and facilities. Very reasonable rates and very friendly
operators.
Great location even though very wet and windy during our 3 day stay. It' was a great site that really suited us.

Lovely van park on the ocean front. Easy walk into town. Amenities blocks clean. Special thanks to Simon who assisted us in reversing into a tight spot due to the boom gate and the ladies in the office who got us a powered beachfront site last minute over the Easter weekend.
Excellent park, truly beautiful and relaxing , awesome views, close to everything you need, the staff are amazing, helpful, and friendly , highly recommend 🤩😎😎🤩

The waterfront location might be superior but for the price of $60 the park is not worth it for a plot of grass and a cement pad. The owners should spend some serious money to bring it up to scratch in line with other parks like NRMA, Discovery and Ingenia as it’s outdated and behind the times. It’s 2025; you can’t book online, can’t arrive after 5pm, can’t access toilets without a key (a touch pad with code essential, considering the door locked was stuffed) reception friendly but would suggest staying elsewhere.

I have clicked 5 stars for ‘rooms’ but please read this as ‘sites’.
A gem of a spot with absolute beachfront sites, amongst beautifully maintained gardens and only a short stroll to the shops. Super friendly and helpful staff. Lovely and clean amenities, and as a travelling single female, felt very safe in the park. Will absolutely be back! Thank you!

I recently had the unfortunate experience of dealing with Beachside Holiday Caravan Park. I looked on the website for prices and details on bookings, no details are listed. I called and spoke with Kath, I placed a $100 deposit to reserve a week in September (over 6 months away). The booking was to attend a sailing regatta, I called back within 6 minutes to cancel as I had booked the wrong caravan park for the location we need to be at. There was no mention of a cancellation fee. I was advised to email my card details for the refund. The option was a $30 admin fee, and $70 credit to stay in the park within the year, or a $30 refund and an admin fee of $70.
This is unfair trading and the admin fee of $70 is ridiculous. I have placed a complaint with the Department of Fair Trading. I will not ever be staying in a place with such poor integrity and lack of service.
Nice park. Beware of booking conditions. 30 plus days out they take 70% of booking fee for cancelations. Wont be staying there again.
I am disgusted in this day and age and that you feel that it is acceptable to charge disabled people a deposit for ammenities keys and no one else.This practice is discriminatory.

My parents stayed at this caravan park last week and were forced to pay a $20 deposit for use of the disabled amenities. They are discriminating against those who are less fortunate and are not diversity, equity or inclusion friendly.

We stayed here recently and needed to use the Disabled amenities and were disgusted to have to pay an additional $20 deposit. Wouldn't even give us a key until we paid the $20. We then had to provide the key back the night before we left to get our $20 back as we were leaving early the next morning. ||It shouldn't cost anymore for accessibility and equality. ||Terrible service and discriminatory towards those who are less fortunate.
Absolutely love this park, right on beach Pet friendly, lovely Management, clean tidy amenities
Did not stay. Only due to fact not pet friendly. But lady came out when she saw me turning Caravan around and was so polite and helpful. 5 stars Darl.

10:40 Ankunft am Platz der ca 30 % belegt war. 35 Grad pralle Sonne, Kleinkind und defekter Kühlschrank in Camper. Wir baten um Check In und sagten auch ganz deutlich das wir für den early Check in bezahlen wollen. Die Dame an der Rezeption komplett herzlos. blieb hart und verwies auf Check In 12.00 Uhr, wir sollen warten.  Natürlich nicht warten musste unsere Zahlung von 72 Dollar für die Nacht, Geld nahm man also auch vor 12.00 Uhr dankend an. Nach bis dato 4800 km Tour durch Australien mit Abstand der übelste Empfang. Dieser Platz ruht sich auf der Lage aus - komplett unnötig so ein Verhalten. Es ist ein Stellplatz und kein Zimmer wo noch ein housekeeping durchwischen muss.
Charges $120.00 if you cancel even in advance and they don’t refund. So $270.00 down the drain for a place we didn’t even stay at. Not to mention the staff is very rude.

We stayed here in a tent.. which the people who run it new .. we were told to move it every  2 days.. which we weren't told about when we booked..   we all cant afford a van but we still want to have a holiday..we all so found them quite rude and  talking to other campers felt the same way.. they drive around on there buggy  watching  u..

Geniale Ausblick direkt am Strand, das war’s dann auch schon. Kein Internet 🛜 empfangen können was für uns sehr wichtig ist. Toiletten und Dusche einigermaßen sauber aber einen seltsamen Geruch, ich habe deswegen im Wohnmobil geduscht. Die Waschküche ist DRECKIG! Leider musste ich Wäsche waschen. Die Waschmaschine Abfluss verstopft von 6 Waschmaschinen waren 3 defekt.
Die Bügelbretter wurde ich einfach raus schmeißen. Wiederlich.
Wunderschöner Caravan Park direkt am Strand
Great camping by the beach. I enjoyed stopping here on my way south. Yeppoon is nice. Good amenities.
Beach at your camp step. Nice

If you want a nice quiet holiday do not come here. Hordes of children run through the sites till after 8pm at night.  We have been coming here for many years and now it is too noisy for us. No hot water in one amenities block and I was told the children keep turning the gas off. No playground or pool for the kids so they run wild throughout the park with no supervision

The Beachside Holiday Park is exactly what is says.  Plenty of access points to the beach. A 1.5 klm walk to Yeppoon Lagoon, which is amazing. Yeppoon is a great town with everything you need. The amenities are clean but basic. While the barbecue area is ok, there is no television or other amusements. Farnborough Road is noisy, but quieter at night. In November there were a few snake sightings and our neighbour had one come in from the dunes almost into his annex (to be aware rather than afraid). We stayed in three holiday parks along the Capricorn Coast, most had better facilities. I think this one is overpriced. If your idea is sitting and watching the tide roll away, this park is for you and worth every cent.
Einfach perfekt, genialer Ausblick auf das Meer. Freundliche Mitarbeiter und sehr gepflegte Sanitäranlagen. Gerne wieder.

Unser Aufenthalt im Beachside Holiday Caravan Park in Yeppoon war einfach großartig! Wir verbrachten im Oktober ein paar Nächte auf einem Powered Campsite und hätten uns keinen besseren Ort wünschen können. Die Lage direkt am Strand ist unschlagbar – morgens aufzuwachen und das Meeresrauschen zu hören, war traumhaft!

Die Stellplätze sind grosszügig und gut gepflegt. Die Sanitäranlagen waren sauber und zweckmässig ausgestattet, was den Aufenthalt sehr angenehm machte. Besonders gefallen hat uns die entspannte Atmosphäre im Park.

Auch die Nähe zu Yeppoon und den vielen Attraktionen in der Umgebung macht diesen Campingplatz ideal für alle, die Natur und Erholung kombinieren möchten. Wir können den Beachside Holiday Caravan Park wärmstens empfehlen.

Beachside Caravan Park, I lived in this park for 12 mths 50 yrs ago. It was a thriving comfortable park then and I never had a problem in that 12 mths with management.
Early 2024 I visited for 3 days in my Motorhome and the park was rundown and little improvement in last 50 yrs.
A groundsman had asked me to move my bike from the annexa area.. I explained as I had concerns of a car being stolen from the park a little earlier this year and didn't want my bike to be stolen either.
I believed I had satisfied staff with the adjustment I made to bike position.
On the 9/11/24 I rung the park for a reservation. Although it was nearly twice as expensive as other parks I had stayed in, it was handy to what I had planned to do only to be told that I had been black listed from the park over the bike incident and they wouldn't take my booking.
I had attempted to explain the bike event that I thought was not a further problem but no, they wouldn't listen and black listing stuck.
Well thank you Beachside Caravan Park but you left me no option to find a much better presented Park at half the price you requested before the black listing popped up.
I'd be frightened to sneeze in this park if your thinking of staying there.
K.W.

We stayed here in August 2024  and again last week in November 2024 as we enjoyed the location so much. The park is an easy 15 minute stroll into town (perfect walk for breakfast, lunch or dinner) and the team are friendly and helpful. You can walk directly onto the beach from the park and depending on tides, walk right into town on the sand. . For those who like a run or walk, you can easily achieve over 10 klm on this beach, and it is very wide so plenty of room to move. The amenities that we used (there are several sets throughout the park) were clean and seemed freshly painted as well. There is always someone from the park around doing maintenance if you need help or advice. We will definitely be back again. It is popular in peak times so make sure you book in advance .

Fantastic camping spot, great location and friendly staff. Will definitely stay here again, we loved it.
Loved the town and the free lagoon pools.

Absolutely perfect for us.
Ablutions were so clean, reception staff were amazing and matey driving around in the golf buggy helped me park my caravan in a really tight awkward spot, that man knows his stuff. All round 5 stars from us. Thank you
Awesome place, the park is so well maintained and sites are really well positioned. We camped in a powered site on the beachfront and it was perfect.

Nice enough park and location however can't say I enjoyed being told off for the angle I parked my van (although online with the others and within my bay) and then having to endure 10 mins of the park manager grumpily telling me how to reverse a trailer. I was fuming but bit my lip and followed his full lock back and forward regime only to finish and discover how he wanted it parked and that it could've been achieved in a simple 3 point turn.

Would've been much more pleasant if he told me where he wanted it and asked if I was able to put it there. Understand some people may struggle reversing but I'm not one of them.

Camping in an unpowered site
The toilets block was the best anywhere. Clean and recently upgraded. Excellent laundry facilities and great staff

We only spent 2 nights here but wish it were longer. We had a beachfront site. There were a few bushes and trees between us and the Beach, so our view wasn't as good as some others in the park, but it probably helped to keep the wind down as we felt quite protected. The amenities were some of the cleanest we have seen. Staff were friendly. Park had a lovely feel to it. Easy walk into town, either on the footpath or along the beach. Park next door for small children. Would love to stay again.
Great location. Small bays but clean amenities. Right by the beach and close to town.

For those caravanning, Yeppoon Beachside Caravan Park is a fantastic choice. The beach is just steps away, and it's only about a kilometer’s walk to the town center. The park is impeccably kept, with beautiful gardens and thick, vibrant green grass. The camp kitchen is top-notch, and the facilities are always clean. The staff are warm and very helpful. There’s also a charming café across the road that serves excellent coffee. The park is tranquil, with a calm and relaxing vibe that won’t disappoint.

Stayed in the overflow area for $45 and had no complaints.
The site is big on security with keys needed to access the doors and toilets which can be annoying.

Superbe camping avec des emplacements vue sur l'ocean, accès pratique
Bien équipé
Calme
Nice cp right on the beach and very close to town. Amenities good and clean. Did the bluff walk which was stunning from the top. Had lunch at the marina. Magnificent sunrises in the morning.

If your caravaning in Yeppoon Beachside Caravan Park is the place to stay. The beach is at your doorstep & about a km walk into town. The park is extremely well maintained with beautiful landscaped gardens & thick green grass. There is a great camp kitchen & amenities were spotless. The staff are friendly & very obliging. There is a great little cafe across the road which does excellent coffee. The park is very quiet & has a lovely relaxing atmosphere you won't be disappointed.

Great location nothing here for kids to do it's more retirement people.
They ask more than anyone I've come across on the East coast of Australia rego make of van both adults staying both addresses both mobile numbers. Take Full payment on booking.
Nice spot for elders only.
And long wait out in middle of the road to check in.
A bit full on for my liking.
$81 a night there are better cheaper places to stay.

Had an awesome time here. Staying for 7 days at this park. Close to to beach 🏖️ for the Grandkids to splash around, and make some sand castles, they have lovely splash pools for them as well, and plenty of parks with swings. Explored the Capricorn Coast Caves, which we really enjoyed. We also went to the Crocodile Farm, which the Tour guide was very nice and gave us plenty of information regarding the farm. The only downside was our puppy has to go to the kennel up the road, But after a few nervous days, she fitted right in. Oh yeah they also have a great Gelato Shop in one of the main streets, which I highly recommended. Thanks again for an Amazing Visit.
Friendly relaxing well maintained beachside caravan park thanks  to team of Kathy. Grant. Demelza.nothing was to much trouble and the booking for next year done with easy can’t wait to return

Spent 7 days at this park, the Grandkids absolutely loved it. The beach 🏖️ was amazing and the Grandkids loved playing and making sandcastles. They have splash pools nearby as well as beautiful parks. Visited the Capricorn Caves, which we really enjoyed, and also enjoyed the Crocodile 🐊 Farm. The tour guide was nice, and gave us lots of great information. Oh yeah the Gelato Shop was high on my list. Unfortunately we had to take our puppy 🐶 to the kennel up the road, which is not to far. After a few uneasy days for her, she fitted right in. We didn’t encounter any issues with the park, the kids enjoyed playing on their scooters etc, without any problems. A most enjoyable time was spent here, the weather did however turn quite cool and windy the last day and a half, other than that, most enjoyable.
Great park.  Very busy.  Bookings are essential.  Great hearing the ocean at night.  Not too much road noise after dark.
Direct beachside camping

This is a little gem of a park.  Absolutely beachside offering a peaceful atmosphere and so close to town - a 10 minute walk by the water.  We were lucky enough to have a beach front site which was delightful.  The amenities and other facilities were excellent.
Thank you for a great stay and I am sure we will be back.

While we were on the road to get to the campsite (over 6 hours on the road with 3 small children, so compulsory stops), we found out that we couldn't arrive after 5pm.|We called to tell them we'd be there at 5.30pm, but there was no flexibility, no offer and of course no refund. All this while telling us that it was written in the terms and conditions.|We've been travelling for 6 months and this has never happened to us!|We therefore lost $103 and have to sleep in a car park with 3 small children, all for arriving ... 30 minutes after the time indicated in the terms and conditions.|Bravo for your welcome and your commercial sense!
Nice caravan park. Thank you !
Lovely park right on the beach, clean amenities, laundry, camp kitchen, more than 1 dump point, walking distance to town. Sites can been a bit tight if you have a big van.
Nit a bad spot....drive through sites....beach front walk....

Beautiful park, great location. Clean amenities. Grant was very friendly and helpful with parking…..unfortunately park manager was grumpy and abrupt / rude when telling us to shift our car from where we had been told to park it the previous day. The old saying, “it’s not what you say but how you say it” is important. Spoiled  our overall experience.

Booked a spot for our boat and car months in advance. Get here and no spots! They end up getting us in behind the toilet block on gravel with our boat and car parked on the street!
Be warned you might not have a spot despite booking months in advance! Very poor management
A great park right on the beach.  Very friendly staff and very clean amenities.  Would definitely recommend
Fantastic park, spacious, lovely surrounds and fabulous service. Thank you for our stay.
I was in a Roof Top tent all the amenities were clean and tidy.
We have recently spent 6 nights at the park. Top location, very well maintained, amenity block super clean. Great staff. Recommend.👍

Certainly! Here's a positive review for the caravan park in Yeppoon, Queensland:

---

I recently had the pleasure of staying at the Beachside Holiday Caravan Park in Yeppoon, Queensland, and I couldn't be more impressed! From the moment we arrived, the check-in process was a breeze, and the friendly staff made us feel welcome.

The amenities were absolutely spotless, which made our stay incredibly comfortable. It's clear that the staff take great pride in maintaining the facilities to the highest standard.

The location is fantastic, situated right next to the beach. We loved waking up to the sound of the waves and enjoyed the convenience of having such a beautiful beach just steps away from our site. Whether you're looking to relax by the water or explore the local area, this caravan park offers the perfect base.

Overall, our experience was top-notch, and we look forward to returning soon. Highly recommended!

Last minute book in very pleasant staff who greeted us gave us all Info. Amenities were fantastic, lovely and clean shower was great, site was small but on the beach. Perfect for us. Easy walk to shops and pubs ect

Great spot on the beach and walking distance to shops and restaurants. Great size site and clean and tidy amenities. Only downer was we were next to a public beach access carpark and track which was noisy during the night as well as the main road was noisy as well but could be due to Saturday night hoons driving past

Very nice spot, walk to town up the path or via the beach. Staff super friendly and helpful. Booked one week and ended up staying two. 10 out of 10 for us. Can be a bit windy around April / May, so take annex if you have one.
Super clean facilities and spots right on the beach perfect for a morning stroll.
Good clean caravan park on the waterfront. Close to town. Friendly staff. Clean amenities.
Sehr gepflegt und sehr nette Betreiber
Best location but bit expensive.Is very clean and well maintained
Friendly helpful staff. great beach front spot, beautiful walks along the beach. Will go again.  Maryka & Pat McCoy
Excellent place to camp or caravan stay in Yeppoon. Easily the best of the tourist parks in the region.
Great place to stay beachfront with the kids

The sites and the amenities are very clean and the staff is very helpful and friendly.
Unfortunately we stayed just one night at this beautiful Campsite.

Thanks for the great service.😊

Great position on the beach. Close to town - short walk. Staff friendly and helpful. Amenities clean and practical. No dirty grout or grotty corners due to smart design. Lots of birds and even lizards.
Lovely stopover in our camper van
Beautiful and friendly
Great place to park up the van and enjoy the beach for a few days.

Have just returned from 3 nights at a Beachfront site. WOW. What a great park. My husband and I are not big fans of caravan parks BUT this was exceptional. Extra large sites, immaculate facilities. Super friendly staff. Grant, never forgot my name and addressed me each time we crossed paths. Definatley reccommend. We will be back
Great Host super tidy park great amenities
Amazing Chinese buffet , so much to choose from authentic taste and great value.
Had a beachside powered site and absolutely loved waking up to the sound of the ocean. The staff were welcoming and friendly on arrival and even let me pick my site! Highly recommending!

This Christmas will be our 5th stay, and we keep coming back because it’s lovely.  Our site looks over the beach, and the sunrise is always worth getting up for.  Clean amenities, friendly staff, we always book a trip over to Great Keppel through the office and they offer transfers to and from the marina.  So helpful.  There are lots of great cafes and restaurants not far away, and we love walking up to the Infinity Pool (there’s car parking also) We thoroughly recommend.
Close to the city centre, beautiful view and kind staff.

Beautiful place, just 20 minutes walk to the center. I’ll definitely go back to spend a couple of days in Yeppoon.
The beachfront sites are awesome, very close to the beach. I recommend this caravan park 100%
A friendly checkin from Mitch. Amenities are spotless. Right on the beach. A great park to stay at. We're coming back again.

My husband and I just stayed 5 nights here, beachfront site.  A really beautiful place. The staff were lovely, park was very clean and looked after. The guys made parking the van a breeze. 5 star place and would definitely return again.
Ok

Saubere Sanitäranlage.
Sehr nettes Personal.
Einchecken erst ab 12Uhr - 17Uhr möglich.
Zahlung im Voraus mit Kreditkarte.
Zugang zum Caravanpark nur mit PIN, da eine Schranke vorhanden ist.
Direkt am Strand/Meer.

Great caravan park, clean and direct access to the beach. Bathrooms are newly renovated and never crowded.
Host Graham was fabulous, checked us in and helped us park our new Caravan. He was a wealth of information.
Beautiful and easy walk to town at low tide.
We will definitely go back.
Lovely quiet clean family orientated awesome beach access
Great holiday park, right on the beach, amenities are spotless and well maintained,  staff are very friendly, entire area is really tidy. So far an enjoyable stay. 👍😁
Fantastic park. Hot showers, and great kitchen right on the beach.

Very friendly staff, spotless and very modern amenities right on beach however the road noise spoilt it. If you book ahead which is a must I’d suggest making sure you asked for a beachfront site even though I think you’d still hear the road.
Wonderful spot
Great place to enjoy winter, fabulous staff, great facilities and right on the beach.  Couldn't be better.
Nice clean and friendly park in a great position.

Whilst we haven’t had a chance to stay here. I’m guessing the park would be fantastic given the level of customer service we received when we tried to book. Not enough places provide other suggestions when they’re fully booked. Thank you we were able to find another place to stay but will definitely try this park next time we are passing through.

Highly recommend Beachside Holiday Caravan Park. The service from the time of booking to departure was fantastic! Friendly, organised & helpful. Location was excellent, views were amazing & the parks amenities were immaculate. Would stay again & recommend anyone staying for a while to short term to stay here! Thank you!
Great place friendly staff.

Personally not a great experience. Park is undoubtedly in a beautiful location, and although there aren’t any real facilities on sites for kids it is only a short walk to the awesome Yeppoon foreshore parks. The main issue I had is the park seems to cater mostly to retiree aged patrons and I witnessed one man yelling at / intimidating young kids (and in this case was totally unreasonable). Then reading reviews here I see that’s not an isolated incident. I recommend families with young kids look elsewhere as there are better parks nearby such as NRMA which although doesn’t have such a great location had a much more welcoming and family friendly atmosphere. Also the sites had a fair bit of road noise, we were on the opposite side of park to road and it was still noticeable at night. Not great value from that perspective either as the site fees are relatively expensive (especially if you were placed next to the road).
Lovely park. When you arrive you are expertly guided into you site. Very helpful service, a marriage saver.
Great park,  immaculate amenities, very friendly staff and just metres from the beach. Close enough to easily walk into town.  Will be back, just for longer

Disappointingly you aren't able to check in after 5pm during winter with no negotiable later check in due to unforeseen circumstances like traffic or emergencies.

This is in their terms and condition but not advertised boldly on the website.

There’s also no refund/part refund.

I was advised that the reason for this was because they don’t want to staff for a later period (? No one is on-site if there’s an issue). Also they like to be advised early as they want to read advertise the available site (double cash for the site).

Overall this is a pretty poor policy in comparison to other sites that provide these services.

1 - Star is given to the lady on the phone that was at least sympathetic.

Great place and we had a spot right on the beach. You can walk along the beach for quite awhile.
Easy checkin but the guy directing you to park your caravan is quite rude and abrupt so be prepared.
Clean and tidy friendly staff and great view

Great caravan park in a fabulous location. Walking distance along the beach or the road to town.
Clean amenities, well cared for park and Mitch is just brilliant.
